question: What is the rate at which annual leave is accrued?
answer: 1.5 days per month, up to a maximum of 15 days per year
answer_paragraph: Our company, NovaTech Inc., values the well-being and work-life balance of its employees. As such, we have implemented a comprehensive leave and time-off policy to ensure that our staff can take the time they need to rest, recharge, and attend to personal matters. The leave and time-off policy is administered by the Human Resources department, led by our HR Manager, Emily Chen. All full-time and part-time employees are eligible for leave and time-off benefits, provided they have completed their probationary period of three months. The company offers various types of leave, including annual leave, sick leave, family and medical leave, bereavement leave, and jury duty leave. Annual leave is accrued at a rate of 1.5 days per month, up to a maximum of 15 days per year, and can be carried over to the next year, up to a maximum of 30 days.

question: How many federal holidays are observed by the company per year?
answer_paragraph: The company also observes 10 federal holidays per year, including New Year's Day, Memorial Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Thanksgiving Day, and Christmas Day. All leave and time-off requests must be submitted to the HR department at least 30 days in advance, unless in cases of emergency or unforeseen circumstances.

question: What is the maximum number of days of bereavement leave available per year?
answer_paragraph: Bereavement leave is available for up to 5 days per year, and can be used to attend to funeral and other bereavement-related activities. Jury duty leave is available for the duration of the jury duty, and employees will receive their regular pay while serving on jury duty.

question: How many days of sick leave are accrued per month?
answer_paragraph: Sick leave is accrued at a rate of 1 day per month, up to a maximum of 12 days per year, and can be used for employee illness or to care for a family member. Family and medical leave is available for up to 12 weeks per year, and can be used for the birth or adoption of a child, to care for a family member with a serious health condition, or for the employee's own serious health condition.

question: What is the average annual leave taken per employee as of December 31, 2022?
answer_paragraph: As of December 31, 2022, the company has 500 employees, and the average annual leave taken per employee is 10 days. The company's leave and time-off policy has been well-received by employees, and has helped to improve employee satisfaction and retention.
